simple_types.name: shape_Kind
simple_types.code:
type shape_Kind is (Cylinder,  Cone,    Cube,  a_Sphere,  a_Capsule,  Heightfield,  Hull,  Mesh,
                    …,    Polygon);

record_types.name: a_Shape

tagged_types.name: Item

access_types.name: View
access_types.code: type View is access all Item'Class;

subprograms.code: procedure define  (Self : in out Item;   Scale : in Vector_3)

subprograms.name: Id
subprograms.code: function  Id       (Self : in     Item'Class)     return model_Id

subprograms.code: procedure Id_is    (Self : in out Item'Class;   Now : in model_Id)
